is.t:
tests\e2e	est_01_landing.py:70: in test_feature_badge_offline_capable assert "Offline Capable" in self.body, \ E AssertionError: The 'Offline Capable' feature badge is not rendering on the landing page. E assert 'Offline Capable' in 'PancreaScan

AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' E + where 'PancreaScan

tests\e2e\test_02_login.py:123: in test_remember_me_checkbox_is_togglable checkbox.click() C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webelement.py:114: in click self._execute(Command.CLICK_ELEMENT) C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webelement.py:508: in _execute return self._parent.execute(command, params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webdriver.py:468: in execute self.error_handler.check_response(response) C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\errorhandler.py:232: in check_response

tests\e2e\test_05_dashboard_nav.py:125: in test_history_table_column_headers_visible assert all(col in body for col in ["Patient ID", "Patient Name", "Scan Result"]), \ E AssertionError: The Patient History table is missing one or more column headers (Patient ID, Patient Name, Scan Result). The history table component may have a rendering error. E assert False E + where False = all(<generator object TestDashboardTabSwitching.test_history_table_column_headers_visible.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x0000027C7F233300>)
